description: Product Description Keep your house stain, grease and grime-free with this dual-sided Scrubbing Pad, the miracle product from Elbow Grease. The soft, microfibre side is ideal to use on delicate surfaces, and the textured, abrasive side is perfect for removing stubborn stains and dirt from kitchen and bathroom surfaces. Perfect for cleaning pots, pans, ovens, worktops, appliances, tiles, kitchen and bathroom sinks, showers,PVC and more. Hand wash and machine washable at 40°C Ingredients Non Scratch Sponge
